name: The Hearth
taglineShort: Bar & restaurant with open fires, proper food, and music at the weekend.

address.landmark: On Bath Green, a short walk from the village centre

bookingNote: Bookings are for indoor dining only. Outdoor seating is walk-in.

hero.imageAlt: Warm bar interior with wood and low light

room.title: A corner for pints, plates, and the fire.
room.body: The Hearth is a neighbourhood bar and restaurant — open fires, a proper kitchen, and a welcome that doesn’t hurry you. Come for a midweek plate and a pint; stay for music when the weekend lands.
room.imageAlt: Restaurant table with warm ambient lighting

visit.title: Find us on Bath Green.
visit.parkingTip: Street parking around Bath Green; easier after 18:00.

ordering.title: Collection only.
ordering.intro: Choose your pizzas online and collect from the bar. We don’t deliver — pay when you pick up.
ordering.payNote: Pay on collection — card or cash.
ordering.successMessage: Order received. We’ll have it ready for collection.
